name: switchbot
description: Control SwitchBot smart-home devices and scenes from Codex via the SwitchBot CLI and MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control SwitchBot devices and scenes from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use the SwitchBot OpenAPI CLI through a Codex skill and MCP server to inspect devices, run scenes, control smart-home hardware, and respect policy-based safety gates.
defaultPrompt: Check the status of my lights.
